blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: Tell him Daniel said what's up.
He stepped aside. Just like that. A sophomore nearby caught the whole thing and looked at me like I'd done something clever.

blocks.speaker: Sophomore
blocks.content: Serious. Most freshmen don't figure that out until like week three.
Smart. He said smart. I used someone else's name as a shield and that's the word for it.

blocks.prompt: What does Larry tell himself walking to class?

options.label: That was the right call. Whatever works.
You used his name. You didn't earn that.
Jonathan would've done the same thing.
